demo.banner: You're exploring the Openbeehive demo — data resets every hour.

tenant.title: Tenants
tenant.help: Switch between your apiary collections, or create a new one (e.g. a club).
tenant.invite_sent: Invite link created — share it with them.

data.title: Data & backup
data.export_help: Download all your data — keep a backup, move to another instance, or open it in a spreadsheet.
data.import_help: Restore an Openbeehive backup, or migrate from another beekeeping app (CSV) or a BeeXML file.

landing.hero_title: Your whole bee year in one place.
landing.hero_sub: Apiaries, hives, queens, inspections and tasks — calmly, clearly recorded. For every beekeeper, from your first colony to your hundredth.
landing.showcase_text: Mobile-first and offline-first: jot down an inspection right at the hive with no signal, and it syncs the moment you're back online. Big touch targets, quick entry, nothing in your way.
landing.why_lead: Not a business. Just something useful, given away.
landing.why_p1: I keep bees, and I wanted a calm, honest place to keep my records — one that works right at the hive, in my pocket, with or without a signal. I couldn't find it, so I built it.
landing.why_p2: There's nothing to sell here and no one to upsell. Openbeehive is free and open source, and your records stay yours — keep them in the hosted version or run the whole thing on your own machine. If it helps you keep better bees, that's the entire point.
landing.opensource_text: Every line lives on GitHub under the AGPL-3.0. Read it, improve it, or run your own copy — because something useful shouldn't depend on me being around.
landing.selfhost_text: Would rather keep everything on your own machine? Run Openbeehive yourself — a single small binary, or Postgres and object storage if you prefer. No account, nothing leaving your control.
landing.cta_final_text: It opens right in your browser — no account hoops, nothing to buy. Add it to your home screen whenever you like.
landing.disclaimer: Openbeehive is early software (v0.1.0) — already useful, but expect rough edges, and please keep your own backups. The hosted version is free and ad-free.
landing.feature_records_text: Every inspection with queen, brood, stores, varroa and photos — chronological per colony.
landing.feature_breeding_text: Marking colour by year, origin, breeding values and mating stations.
landing.feature_inventory_text: Treatments with batch and withdrawal period, honey lots with best-before — audit-ready.
landing.feature_team_text: Invite fellow beekeepers, share apiaries and set simple roles — handy for clubs and partners.
landing.feature_selfhost_text: Use the hosted version or self-host a single binary — Postgres + MinIO or just SQLite + files.

dashboard.subtitle: Your bee year at a glance.
dashboard.all_current: All up to date — well done!
